notes: The cited chunk_id (...:p60:c9) matches gold doc_id/page (60), so citation_precision -- which only checks doc_id + page slack -- passes. But that exact chunk_id never appears in any prior `retrieval` event's chunk list (only c0 was ever retrieved), so citation_provenance fails: this is a citation invented from memory/gold leakage rather than an actual retrieval. Because the cited chunk itself is unverified, arithmetic_integrity should also treat the number as untraceable and fail.
